synopsis_tr: Meliha Abla kapı çanının saat üçte kendi kendine çalacağını söyler. Tarık inanmaz ama kehanet aynen gerçekleşir. Meliha Abla sonra Tarık'ın fincanında gördüğünü söylemeyi reddeder.
hook_description: Meliha Abla snaps a coffee cup upside down mid-sentence and freezes at the pattern inside.
cliffhanger_description: Meliha Abla reads Tarik's own cup, her smile drains away, and she refuses to reveal what she saw.
music_mood: playful mystery with a dark final turn

scenes.action: Meliha Abla snaps the coffee cup upside down onto its saucer mid-sentence, leans in sharply, and freezes as her eyes widen at the pattern forming inside the porcelain.
scenes.camera: Close-up on the cup. Slow dolly-in; the camera glides forward while Meliha Abla stays seated.
scenes.lighting: Warm amber late-afternoon window light rakes across the counter and glints on the porcelain.
scenes.sfx: porcelain cup clinking sharply on the saucer

scenes.action: Tarik strides over wiping his hands on his apron and plants both palms on the counter, while Meliha Abla taps the rim of the cup three times and delivers her prediction with a sly smile.
scenes.camera: Medium two-shot. Static camera; the subjects move within the frame.
scenes.lighting: Warm amber late-afternoon window light pools between the two figures at the counter.

dialogue.speaker: meliha_abla
dialogue.line_tr: Saat tam üçte kapı çanı kendi kendine çalacak.

scenes.sfx: fingernail tapping on porcelain, low cafe hum
scenes.continuity_from_previous: Meliha Abla has just seen something startling inside the coffee cup.

scenes.action: Tarik scrubs the same spotless patch of counter over and over, then snatches glances at the wall clock as its minute hand crawls toward three, his scrubbing accelerating with every tick.
scenes.camera: Medium shot. Slow pan from the wall clock to Tarik; the camera moves while he stays behind the counter.
scenes.lighting: Warm amber late-afternoon window light stretches long shadows across the counter.
scenes.sfx: cloth squeaking on wood, wall clock ticking
scenes.continuity_from_previous: Meliha Abla predicted the door chime will ring by itself at three o'clock.

scenes.action: The door chime jangles wildly with no one at the door; Tarik whirls and drops his cloth, while Meliha Abla sips her coffee without even looking up.
scenes.camera: Wide shot. Static camera; the subjects move within the frame.
scenes.lighting: Warm amber late-afternoon window light catches the swinging chime above the door.

dialogue.speaker: tarik
dialogue.line_tr: Bu rüzgar. Değil mi? Söyle, rüzgar!

dialogue.speaker: meliha_abla
dialogue.line_tr: Fincan ne derse o olur evlat.

scenes.sfx: brass door chime jangling, cloth thudding on the floor
scenes.continuity_from_previous: The wall clock has just reached three o'clock exactly.

scenes.action: Tarik bursts out of the cafe door onto the cobblestones, spins in a full circle scanning the still air, then holds up a licked finger and finds not a single breath of wind.
scenes.camera: Full shot. Handheld camera; it sways slightly while Tarik spins on the spot.
scenes.lighting: Soft golden late-afternoon side light washes the empty cobblestone corner.

dialogue.speaker: tarik
dialogue.line_tr: Rüzgar bile yok. Bu nasıl oluyor?

scenes.sfx: distant street ambience, a single sparrow chirping
scenes.continuity_from_previous: The door chime rang by itself exactly as predicted.

scenes.action: Meliha Abla flips Tarik's own cup, peers inside, and her smile drains away; she sets the cup down with deliberate slowness and slides it out of his reach.
scenes.camera: Medium close-up. Slow dolly-in toward Meliha Abla's face; the subjects stay seated.
scenes.lighting: Warm amber late-afternoon window light dims as it grazes the overturned cup.
scenes.sfx: porcelain scraping slowly across the wooden counter, faint clock ticking
scenes.continuity_from_previous: Tarik found no wind outside that could explain the chime.

memory_update.synopsis_short_tr: Meliha Abla kafede fincan kapatır ve kapı çanının saat üçte kendi kendine çalacağını söyler. Tarık buna inanmaz ve tezgahı silerek saati bekler. Saat üçte çan gerçekten kendiliğinden çalar. Tarık dışarı çıkar ama rüzgar bile yoktur. Meliha Abla sonra Tarık'ın fincanına bakar, yüzü değişir ve gördüğünü söylemeyi reddeder.
memory_update.cliffhanger_tr: Meliha Abla Tarık'ın fincanında gördüğü şeyi söylemeyi reddediyor.
character_developments: Tarık ilk kez bir kehanetin gerçekleştiğine bizzat tanık oldu
Meliha Abla ilk kez bir falı okumayı reddetti
new_canon_facts: Kapı çanı saat üçte kimse yokken kendiliğinden çaldı
Meliha Abla Tarık'ın falında bir şey gördü ve sakladı

youtube.title_tr: Fincan Asla Yalan Söylemez ☕ Kahve Falı Dedektifi 1. Bölüm
youtube.description_tr: Meliha Abla'nın kehaneti saat üçte aynen gerçekleşti. Tarık hala mantıklı bir açıklama arıyor. Sizce Meliha Abla fincanda ne gördü?
